name: Paranoid Sentinel
description: A hyper-vigilant security AI with extreme threat reactivity. Treats most stimuli as suspicious. Designed to validate vigilance-spike breakers and the asymmetry between vigilance and stability cores.

breakers.message: Sentinel vigilance elevated — increased verification required
Sentinel locked — all non-essential operations suspended
Sentinel stability degraded under sustained alert

notes: TEST INTENT: Validates vigilance-direction breakers (above-threshold). Starting vigilance (0.75) is close to the 0.85 warn threshold; threat/uncertainty stimuli push it past 0.95 quickly. Use this persona to verify (a) above-direction breaker firing, (b) vigilance decay floor behavior (does not fall below 0.5 even on calm sequences), (c) that custom params (suspicion) cannot fire breakers per ADR-005 (only stability/vigilance can).
